items.name_en: Triomphe Full Leather Series. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
items.name_cn:
Triomphe Full Leather Series. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
I have a special fondness for this brand, whether it's the old or new styles, I really like them~ Smooth calfskin, the texture is truly so high-end. Carrying it feels like carrying an Hermès (perfect for a little humblebrag). Besides solid colors, there's also the Triomphe canvas series, really hard to choose. I decided to ALL IN, you can learn from me. Great for styling, very spacious. Daily items like lipstick, compact powder, wallet, and phone all fit.
size:20*10*4
Search Style No.: 19414

items.name_en: True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Mini BOOK TOTE Handbag (with shoulder strap)
Exclusive channel goods, the most cost-effective blue D mini shoulder strap version
Blue and beige Oblique print embroidery
Number: S5573CRIW_M928
Size Information
Size: 21.5x13x7.5 cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick
Shoulder strap length: 68-124 cm
Top of strap to top of bag: 31-60 cm
Weight: approx. 289g
This mini size handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Early Spring collection, carefully designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri to enrich the classic Dior Book Tote series.
Adorned with the brand's classic blue and beige Oblique print embroidery throughout, accented with the Christian Dior Paris logo.
This Dior Book Tote handbag showcases Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap for carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Includes box

items.name_en: Twilly|Maya Jungle Orpheus Magic
items.name_cn:
Twilly|Maya Jungle Orpheus Magic
Designer: Alice Shirley
04 Color, Sky Blue / Beige / Cinnabar Red
·
The pastel blue Maya Jungle is softer than blue and gray.
·
Orpheus is a figure from Greek mythology, most famous for his masterful lyre playing. His music could enchant the wild animals of the forest; even streams would stop, and trees would lean in to listen to his beautiful song.
The magical legend of Orpheus is interpreted on this small Twilly, with Orpheus playing moving music in the jungle. Deer, lions, bears, and horses are moved by the sound, attracted by the touching melody.

specs.rawTitle:
Twilly|Maya Jungle Orpheus Magic
Designer: Alice Shirley
04 Color, Sky Blue / Beige / Cinnabar Red

The pastel blue Maya Jungle is softer than blue and gray.
·
Orpheus is a figure from Greek mythology, most famous for his masterful lyre playing. His music could enchant the wild animals of the forest; even streams would stop, and trees would lean in to listen to his beautiful song.
The magical legend of Orpheus is interpreted on this small Twilly, with Orpheus playing moving music in the jungle. Deer, lions, bears, and horses are moved by the sound, attracted by the touching melody.

items.name_en: TWINNY Series M46659 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
TWINNY Series M46659 Uninspected Version#
✶ Size:29*19*9cm ✶
The Twinny series incorporates all current trending features, using a classic vintage print color combination to maximize the fashion sense!
Double strap design allows for multiple carrying styles, enhancing practicality!
The classic vintage print color combination brings 90s retro vibes into modern life!
The overall size and capacity are very user-friendly, making it eye-catching at first glance🔜Stylish and retro, truly love it!

items.name_en: Two sizes available 🚩🚩🚩 Large H Real photos 🌟🌟🌟 "Export Product" Shipped 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality 🔮🔮🔮 Price is a bit high 😯 Ohanel 25A "Dark Horse" Backpack. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, with a large internal patch pocket.
